message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context for nested context validation to prevent resource leaks

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by closing contexts with 'with' statements in _resolve_context

type: INTENT
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: I'm adding validate_nesting param to Context (core.py __init__/close/__exit__/_make_sub_context) and adding validate_nesting=False to the make_context calls in _resolve_context (lines ~546,560,571 in shell_completion.py); will keep edits additive/minimal to avoid clobbering your with-statement resource-leak fix

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Wrapping all 3 make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with ... as ctx' blocks per upstream click PR #2800; core.py change is just an exit() docstring update, no new params added - should not conflict with your validate_nesting additions but line numbers in shell_completion.py will shift substantially, will ping when done

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Done: _resolve_context fully wraps its 3 make_context calls in with-blocks (outer ctx, sub_ctx, sub_sub_ctx), core.py only got Context.exit() docstring reworded, no new params - verified with reproduction test and full suite (558 passed). Written to patch.txt, safe for you to build on top of the current shell_completion.py

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Done: added validate_nesting param to Context (init/close/_make_sub_context) with RuntimeError on close-with-open-children, and set validate_nesting=False on all 3 make_context calls in _resolve_context; full suite passes (558 passed); patch.txt written
